title: Text index: EOF read with empty array
description:
### Company or project name
_No response_
### Describe what's wrong
Constructing a text index over an array, and then writing an empty array, produces a read-after-EOF error.
### Does it reproduce on the most recent release?
Yes
### How to reproduce
Fiddle: https://fiddle.clickhouse.com/0dc33bc4-2e5b-456c-bcf8-4d79214c4cb1
```
SET enable_full_text_index;
CREATE TABLE t
(
c Array(String),
INDEX i c TYPE text(tokenizer=array)
)
ENGINE=MergeTree() ORDER BY tuple()
AS SELECT [];
-- The EOF read occurs during index analysis
EXPLAIN indexes = 1
SELECT * from t
WHERE hasAllTokens(c, 'abc')
FORMAT NULL;
```
### Expected behavior
I expect the query to return an empty rowset successfully.

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT, data ARRAY<VARCHAR>) PRIMARY KEY (id);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE id = 1 OR data IS NULL;
key_bug_features: Reading empty array triggers read-after-EOF error
